## How it works

- _1_
**Choose Vehicle** Browse our fleet of fully licensed, TfL approved PCO cars. From fuel-efficient hybrids to spacious electric vehicles, you’ll find the perfect car to suit your driving style and budget.

- _2_
**Submit Documents** Upload your driving licence, PCO licence, and proof of address. We’ll quickly verify everything, and if you’ve got your own insurance, just send that over too. Our process is fast, secure, and fully online.

- _3_
**Collect Vehicle** Once approved, you can collect your PCO car — often the very same day. Every vehicle is clean, maintained, and ready to hit the streets of London.

- _4_
**Start driving and earning** You’re ready to go! Start accepting jobs with Uber, Bolt, Wheely and more. Earn straight away with Westgate’s all-inclusive rental, you can focus on your work while we handle the rest.
